lavaanModel:
# Latent Variable Definitions
Image =~ IMAG1 + IMAG2 + IMAG3 + IMAG4 + IMAG5
Expectation =~ CUEX3
CUEX3 ~~ 0*CUEX3
Value =~ PERV1 + PERV2
Satisfaction =~ CUSA1 + CUSA2 + CUSA3
Image_x_Expectation =~ Image_x_Expectation_intxn
Image_x_Expectation_intxn ~~ 0*Image_x_Expectation_intxn

# Regressions
Satisfaction ~ Image + Expectation + Value + Image_x_Expectation
